seoTitle: Ravenshoe vs Ravenswood — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ravenshoe and Ravenswood. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ravenshoe and Ravenswood.
heading: Ravenshoe vs Ravenswood — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ravenshoe, Queensland and Ravenswood, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ravenshoe has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Ravenswood (29/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ravenshoe or Ravenswood safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ravenshoe has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Ravenswood scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ravenshoe scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Ravenswood scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ravenshoe or Ravenswood?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ravenshoe has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
